import pytest
import asyncio
from source import run_race

@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_async_race_condition():
    # Run multiple times to increase likelihood of exposing the race condition
    # The bug causes the final count to be less than 50 due to lost updates
    final_count = await run_race()
    assert final_count == 50, f"Expected 50 but got {final_count}. Race condition detected!"
